title: AMQP 0-9-1 Topology and Routing Models · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible an executable Go topology and destination model with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an executable Go topology and destination model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Use virtual hosts as separate topology and permission namespaces while recognizing they are not complete process or resource isolation; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Derive destination sets from exchange type, routing key, binding key, headers, and exchange-to-exchange bindings; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Amqp Entity Model
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 6092 during table-driven topology review for a tenant migration. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from AMQP exchange and binding values; keep message identity out of metric labels while preserving causal traces; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
